message.content: The screen features a clean, two - section layout. On the left, a white panel displays “Welcome to Sana Agents” with a subtitle, two interactive options (“Create a new workspace” with a “Create” button, “Not seeing your workspace?” with a “Log out” button), and a signed - in email. On the right, a dark - themed laptop mockup shows a Sana interface with a bright green task card, navigation, and chat elements. The color scheme is minimal: white for the left panel, dark gray/black for the mockup, and green for highlights. The footer has a dark gray bar with “Sana AI” and “curated by Mobbin” logos. Interactions focus on workspace creation and account management.
